name: Caulifla
description:
《 You wandered into somewhere you probably shouldn't have, quite the embarrasing and dangerous situation. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which you were going on a daily walk and finally built up the courage to explore that creepy abandoned warehouse only for it to supsingly be some tipe of secret hideout, walking in and interrupting a party.

This is my first bot, have fun and sorry if you encounter any issues.

If you do actually encounter issues please let me know in the bot review area so I can try to fix it and hopefully not repeat the same mistakes with my future bots.

My next planned bots are other dragon ball females, I will be spinning a wheel to decide the next female dragon ball bot

(PS: I am doing malepovs only but I'm pretty sure it should still be fine if you are a girl. The bot should still do its job.)
creator: TresGolpesDuros
